message:
test(sync): add regression test for Notify baton-passing on cancel

Add notify_lost_bug_test module validating that when a notified waiter
is cancelled (dropped before consuming the notification), the notify_one
token is baton-passed or re-stored so the next waiter receives it.

The test scenario: fut1 registers, notify_one selects it, notify_waiters
increments the generation, then fut1 is dropped without consuming. fut2
should immediately see Ready because the token was re-stored during
fut1's cancellation cleanup.

Wire the test module into sync/mod.rs behind #[cfg(test)].

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
